apiEntries.body: {"version":1,"features":[{"name":"enable-license-validation","description":"If enabled, the package will validate the license against the server; if disabled, no validation will occur. This ensures that active clients remain unaffected during license server deployments or downtime.","enabled":false,"strategies":[{"name":"default","parameters":{}}]},{"name":"enable-license-validation-dev","description":"If enabled, the package will validate the license against the server; if disabled, no validation will occur. This ensures that active clients remain unaffected during license server deployments or downtime. (On dev environment)","enabled":true,"strategies":[{"name":"default","parameters":{}}]}]}
